title: Flavor Flav Launches GoFundMe to Support U.S. Women’s Hockey Team Following Gold Medal Victory
summary: Flav wants to make sure the ladies can have the celebration they deserve for She Got Game weekend in Las Vegas.
body: Flavor Flav has launched a GoFundMe to support the U.S. women’s hockey team following their gold medal win at the 2026 Milan Cortina Olympics. The Public Enemy hype man is hosting She Got Game weekend for the ladies on the ice in Las Vegas from July 16-19, and he’s looking for public financial support to make sure they’re celebrated properly. “Many of y’all asked how you can support and donate to our female athletes and the celebrations, so I created a GoFundMe,” he wrote to X. “I’m hopeful this can have an impact beyond the weekend and help those that represent the best of the U.S.” Flav added in the GoFundMe description: “These athletes dedicate countless hours to their training and competition, often while juggling second and third jobs just to make ends meet. They deserve to be celebrated and supported for their achievements, not just on the field but in their everyday lives.” Many of y’all asked how you can support and donate to our female athletes and the celebrations,,, so I created a Go Fund Me. I’m hopeful this can have an impact beyond the weekend and help those that represent the best of the US https://t.co/V2KnQs48e…

title: Salt Bread Is Ready to Win Over the World
summary: The range of flavors and fillings of salt bread have diversified as it has become a global hit | Tano Justin’s Salt Bread, a new bakery in New York City, serves only one food item.
